response: 8867 is prime. It has no divisors among primes up to 97 (sqrt(8867) ≈ 94.2). All tests for divisibility by primes like 2, 3, 5, 7, 11, etc., yield non-zero remainders.
reasoning_content:
We need to check if 8867 is prime. Quick sanity check: check divisibility by small primes. sqrt(8867) is about 94.2 (since 94^2=8836, 95^2=9025). So we need to test primes up to 97.

Check mod 2: odd, not divisible.
mod 3: sum digits 8+8+6+7=29, not divisible by 3.
mod 5: last digit not 0 or 5.
mod 7: 8867/7? 7*1266=8862, remainder 5, so not divisible.
mod 11: alternating sum: 8-8+6-7=-1, not multiple of 11.
mod 13: 13*682=8866, remainder 1, so no.
mod 17: 17*521=8857, remainder 10; 17*522=8874 too high, so no.
mod 19: 19*466=8854, remainder 13; 19*467=8873, so no.
mod 23: 23*385=8855, remainder 12; 23*386=8878, so no.
mod 29: 29*305=8845, remainder 22; 29*306=8874, so no.
mod 31: 31*286=8866, remainder 1, so no.
mod 37: 37*239=8843, remainder 24; 37*240=8880, so no.
mod 41: 41*216=8856, remainder 11; 41*217=8897, so no.
mod 43: 43*206=8858, remainder 9; 43*207=8901, so no.
mod 47: 47*188=8836, remainder 31; 47*189=8883, so no.
mod 53: 53*167=8851, remainder 16; 53*168=8904, so no.
mod 59: 59*150=8850, remainder 17; 59*151=8909, so no.
mod 61: 61*145=8845, remainder 22; 61*146=8906, so no.
mod 67: 67*132=8844, remainder 23; 67*133=8911, so no.
mod 71: 71*124=8804, remainder 63; 71*125=8875, so 8875-8867=8, so remainder -8? Actually 71*125=8875, too high, so 71*124=8804, difference 63, not divisible.
mod 73: 73*121=8833, remainder 34; 73*122=8906, no.
mod 79: 79*112=8848, remainder 19; 79*113=8927, no.
mod 83: 83*106=8798, remainder 69; 83*107=8881, so no.
mod 89: 89*99=8811, remainder 56; 89*100=8900, no.
mod 97: 97*91=8827, remainder 40; 97*92=8924, no.

Thus no divisor found. So 8867 is prime. Quick sanity check: yes.
